title: buddhimath aayojakaya
text: yuddhaye kalawa yanu upaya marga  upak rama saha nayakathwaya pilibanda awabodhayak laba dena purana china hamuda nibandhanayaki  purudu apage jiwithaya hadagaswana balawath balawega we  purudu k riya karana aakaraya therum ganima naraka purudu athharimata saha honda purudu athi kara ganimata apata upakari we               nishpadana saha sewa punarawarthana lesa snwardhanaya kirima saha pariksha kirima magin sarthaka w yapara godanagima sandaha ramuwak sapayayi  nawothpadakayage ubhathokotikaya kadakappalkari thak shanayan hamuwe naw yakaranaya kirimata uthsaha karana wita sthapitha samagam muhuna dena abhiyoga gaweshanaya karayi  deshapalana asthawarathwaya  aarthika parihaniya saha militari durwalatha athulu sadhakawala snkirna anthar k riyakarithwaya hethuwen roma adhiraj yaya  warak wishala ha balagathu shishtacharayak awasanaye binda watuni  aayojanaya pilibanda mema sambhaw ya potha mul ya sarthakathwaya la   kara ganima sandaha kalanurupi muladharma sapayayi

title: sepiyans  manawa wargayage keti ithihasayak
text: nishpadana saha sewa punarawarthana lesa snwardhanaya kirima saha pariksha kirima magin sarthaka w yapara godanagima sandaha ramuwak sapayayi  mema potha gal yugaye sita ada dakwa manawa wargayage ithihasaya gaweshanaya karayi  apage wisheshaya hadagaswa athi p radhana siduwim saha balawega pariksha karayi  aayojanaya pilibanda mema sambhaw ya potha mul ya sarthakathwaya la   kara ganima sandaha kalanurupi muladharma sapayayi  mema potha apage thirana palanaya karana chinthana paddhathi deka wimarshanaya karayi  paddhathiya    wegawath saha buddhimaya  saha           mandagami saha hithamatha  nawothpadakayage ubhathokotikaya kadakappalkari thak shanayan hamuwe naw yakaranaya kirimata uthsaha karana wita sthapitha samagam muhuna dena abhiyoga gaweshanaya karayi  purudu apage jiwithaya hadagaswana balawath balawegayaki  purudu k riya karana aakaraya therum ganima naraka purudu athharimata saha honda purudu athi kara ganimata apata upakari we  mema potha pudgalayanta owunge paudgalika saha wa ththiya jiwithaya thula wadi karyakshamathawayak laba ganimata upakara kala haki purudu hathak genahara dakwayi  deshapalana asthawarathwaya  aarthika parihaniya saha militari durwalatha athulu sadhakawala snkirna anthar k riyakarithwaya hethuwen roma adhiraj yaya  warak wishala ha balagathu shishtacharayak awasanaye binda watuni

title: ihala paladayi pudgalayinge purudu
text: purudu apage jiwithaya hadagaswana balawath balawega we  purudu k riya karana aakaraya therum ganima naraka purudu athharimata saha honda purudu athi kara ganimata apata upakari we  yuddhaye kalawa yanu upaya marga  upak rama saha nayakathwaya pilibanda awabodhayak laba dena purana china hamuda nibandhanayaki  mema potha pudgalayanta owunge paudgalika saha wa ththiya jiwithaya thula wadi karyakshamathawayak laba ganimata upakara kala haki purudu hathak genahara dakwayi  mema potha apage thirana palanaya karana chinthana paddhathi deka wimarshanaya karayi  paddhathiya    wegawath saha buddhimaya  saha           mandagami saha hithamatha               nishpadana saha sewa punarawarthana lesa snwardhanaya kirima saha pariksha kirima magin sarthaka w yapara godanagima sandaha ramuwak sapayayi  mema potha gal yugaye sita ada dakwa manawa wargayage ithihasaya gaweshanaya karayi  apage wisheshaya hadagaswa athi p radhana siduwim saha balawega pariksha karayi

title: yuddhaye kala
text: yuddhaye kalawa yanu upaya marga  upak rama saha nayakathwaya pilibanda awabodhayak laba dena purana china hamuda nibandhanayaki  aayojanaya pilibanda mema sambhaw ya potha mul ya sarthakathwaya la   kara ganima sandaha kalanurupi muladharma sapayayi               nishpadana saha sewa punarawarthana lesa snwardhanaya kirima saha pariksha kirima magin sarthaka w yapara godanagima sandaha ramuwak sapayayi  mema potha pudgalayanta owunge paudgalika saha wa ththiya jiwithaya thula wadi karyakshamathawayak laba ganimata upakara kala haki purudu hathak genahara dakwayi  kalak wishala ha balawath shishtacharayak wu roma adhiraj yaya awasanaye deshapalana asthawarathwaya  aarthika parihaniya saha hamuda durwalatha athulu sadhakawala snkirna anthar k riyakarithwaya hethuwen binda watuni  nawothpadakayage ubhathokotikaya kadakappalkari thak shanayan hamuwe naw yakaranaya kirimata uthsaha karana wita sthapitha samagam muhuna dena abhiyoga gaweshanaya karayi  purudu apage jiwithaya hadagaswana balawath balawega we  purudu k riya karana aakaraya therum ganima naraka purudu athharimata saha honda purudu athi kara ganimata apata upakari we  b rithan ya kauthukagaraye wasthu    ka ekathuwa  paranithama mewalamwala sita nawinathama thak shanika diyunuwa dakwa manawa ithihasaye kathawa kiyayi

title: nawothpadakayage ubhathokotika
text: deshapalana asthawarathwaya  aarthika parihaniya saha militari durwalatha athulu sadhakawala snkirna anthar k riyakarithwaya hethuwen romanu adhiraj yaya  warak wishala ha balagathu shishtacharayak awasanaye binda watuni  mema potha apage thirana palanaya karana chinthana paddhathi deka wimarshanaya karayi  paddhathiya    wegawath saha awabodhathmaka wana athara  paddhathiya    mandagami saha hithamatha  nawothpadakayage ubhathokotikaya kadakappalkari thak shanayan hamuwe naw yakaranaya kirimata uthsaha karana wita sthapitha samagam muhuna dena abhiyoga gaweshanaya karayi

title: wasthu    kin loka ithihasayak
text: purudu apage jiwithaya hadagaswana balawath balawega we  purudu k riya karana aakaraya therum ganima naraka purudu athharimata saha honda purudu athi kara ganimata apata upakari we  mema potha gal yugaye sita ada dakwa manawa wargayage ithihasaya gaweshanaya karayi  apage wisheshaya hadagaswa athi p radhana siduwim saha balawega pariksha karayi  deshapalana asthawarathwaya  aarthika parihaniya saha militari durwalatha athulu sadhakawala snkirna anthar k riyakarithwaya hethuwen roma adhiraj yaya  warak wishala ha balagathu shishtacharayak awasanaye binda watuni
